# SpoutLibrary.dll

Place **SpoutLibrary.dll** (x64, v2.007+) in this folder before building or running.

1. Download [Spout SDK binaries](https://github.com/leadedge/Spout2/releases) (`Spout-SDK-binaries_*.zip`)
2. Copy `SpoutLibrary.dll` from the `Binaries` folder into this directory

The app will not publish Spout frames until the DLL is present. The config UI will still load and validate your API token.
